title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO TUDELA, MUNICIPALITY OF ARACELI, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO CALANDAGAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4779 / 53 OG No. 15, 4783 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1670, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO TUDELA, MUNICIPALITY OF ARACELI, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO CALANDAGAN.
